data.title: Build‑A‑Bear's New Frosted Animal Cookie Collection Turns Sweet Nostalgia into a Squeezable Treat
data.description: Build-A-Bear Workshop, famous for its personalized creations, is introducing a nostalgic throwback with a sprinkle-covered twist. The renowned experiential retailer, recognized for enriching lives with heartfelt experiences, is rolling out a new offering. This initiative brings back memories and adds a playful touch to their signature customization. The launch is set to captivate customers with a sprinkle-coated surprise, showcasing the brand's commitment to delivering unique and memorable experiences.

data.title: Pinnacle Mergers & Acquisitions Facilitates Sale of Toyota of Gallatin in Metro Nashville
data.description: A recent transaction in the Metro Nashville market involved the sale of Toyota of Gallatin by Stumbo Automotive's Dave Stumbo to Lithia Motors. The seller was represented by Pinnacle Mergers & Acquisitions. The deal was finalized on March 5, 2026, and took place in SOUTHLAKE, Texas. This takeover marks an important development in the automotive industry with significant financial implications.

data.title: Market Intelligence Provider Permutable AI Shortlisted at Hedgeweek Awards as Geopolitical Tensions Shake Markets
data.description: Permutable AI, a market intelligence provider, reports that increasing geopolitical uncertainty has led to a surge in demand from institutional investors for AI technology that can analyze rapidly changing market narratives. This demand is driven by the need to navigate the volatile market conditions more effectively.
Iran’s Foreign Minister Araghchi: Iran has not asked for a ceasefire.

data.title: Other World Computing (OWC) Announces Storage and Connectivity Solutions for Apple’s New MacBook Neo
data.description: In Woodstock, Illinois, Other World Computing (OWC®), a reputable provider of storage, memory, connectivity, software, and accessories for professionals, unveiled new storage and connectivity offerings for Apple's latest MacBook Neo. The OWC products are designed to bolster the performance, reliability, and efficiency of the MacBook Neo. One of the featured offerings is the OWC USB-C Travel Dock, equipped with five crucial ports. This range of products aims to support, expand, and elevate the functionalities of the Apple MacBook Neo, catering to the needs of creative and business users.

data.title: TASE Reports the Results of the Financial Statements for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025
data.description: In 2025, the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange experienced growth in all segments. CEO Ittai Ben Zeev attributed the positive financial results to the ongoing organic growth in core activities and development of the Israeli capital market and TASE-listed companies. The TASE concluded the year on a strong note, with significant progress seen across the board.

data.title: Project EverGreen Celebrates 20 Years of GreenCare for Troops,™ Expands Support to Disabled Veterans
data.description: In Cleveland, Project EverGreen celebrates two decades of its GreenCare for Troops initiative, which provides lawn and landscape services to military families. They have recently announced plans to extend these services to disabled veterans in specific states from 2026 onwards.

data.title: Bespoke Partners Moves Headquarters to Austin, Texas
data.description: Bespoke Partners has recently revealed plans to move its headquarters to Austin, Texas.

data.title: Ordr Leads the Future of Payment Security with Cy4Data Labs’ Atomic-Level Encryption
data.description: In SAN JOSE, California, Cy4Data Labs, a cybersecurity firm, revealed their selection by Ordr, a prominent player in sports and entertainment payment processing, for safeguarding customer data. By opting for Cy4Secure, Ordr aims to fortify personal details at risk due to conventional PCI-DSS cardholder security norms. This move is critical as Ordr oversees tens of millions in transactions monthly, emphasizing the need for robust cybersecurity measures.

data.title: Littlejohn & Co. Partners With GDS Associates to Support the Next Phase of Growth
data.description: Littlejohn & Co., LLC, a private investment firm in Greenwich, CT, has partnered with GDS Associates, Inc., a prominent provider of power infrastructure consulting to the U.S. electric utility sector. The strategic alliance aims to enhance GDS's offerings through investments and pursuing additional acquisitions. GDS is well-known for its advisory services and management of power infrastructure. The partnership signifies an opportunity for growth and advancement for both companies in the industry.

data.title: The Drink Quietly Challenging Beer: Global Cider Market to Reach USD 26.9 Billion as Premium Alcohol Trends Reshape the Beverage Industry, Says Maximize Market Research
data.description: In Pune, India, on March 5, 2026, it was reported that beer has long been the primary choice in the global drinking scene. However, a new contender is emerging to redefine the alcoholic beverage industry. This trend is evident in pubs throughout the United Kingdom, craft taprooms in North America, and an increasing number of beverage establishments worldwide.
